sql_array: CREATE TABLE TestNulls (id Nullable(Int32), value Nullable(Int32));
INSERT INTO TestNulls (id, value) VALUES (1, NULL), (2, 3), (3, NULL);
SELECT id, multiIf(value IS NULL, 'Value is NULL', value < 2, 'Less than 2', '2 or more') AS description FROM TestNulls;
UPDATE TestNulls SET value = 5 WHERE value IS NULL;
SELECT id, value, NULL < value AS comparison_result FROM TestNulls;
